Work it, work is never over
Work it, work is never over
Work it, work is never over
Work it, work is never over
Work it, work is never over
Work it, work is never over
Work it, work is never over
Work it, work is never over...

Work it harder, never over
Work it harder, never over
Work it harder, never over
Work it harder, never over
Work it harder, never over
Work it harder, never over
Work it harder, never over
Work it harder, never over

Work it harder, make it better
Do it faster
Makes 'ever over
Work it harder, make it better
Do it faster
Makes 'ever over

Do it faster
Makes it better
Do it faster
Makes it better
Do it faster
Makes it better
Do it faster
Makes it better
Do it faster, makes it better...
(Hour after, our work)

Hour after, our work
Hour after, our work
Hour after, our work
Hour after, our work

More than ever
Hour after
Our work is
Never over

More than ever
Hour after
Our work is
Never over

Our work is
Never over

Make it better
Do it faster
Make it
Work it harder, make it better...
